title: How Anthropic Engineers ACTUALLY Prompt Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese outlines four rules for effective Claude Code prompting derived from Anthropic engineering practices: prompt skills rather than Claude directly, treat skills as more than static prompts, build composable reusable skills instead of custom ones, and allow skills to improve over sessions. The video includes practical patterns like saving scripts within skills and controlling invocation permissions.
